title: Goals
subtitle: Savings targets that feel tangible.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This action cannot be undone.

dialog.addDescription: Set a new savings target with a deadline and optional linked account.
dialog.editDescription: Update this goal's target, progress, deadline, or linked account.

discard.title: Discard changes?
discard.description: You have unsaved changes. Close this form without saving?

automation.title: Automation
automation.subtitle: A practical saving pace based on your goal data.
automation.monthlyMove: Move {{amount}} each month toward {{goal}} to stay on pace.
automation.keepPace: {{goal}} is already funded or does not need a monthly pace yet. Keep it visible and update progress when money moves.
automation.empty: Create a savings goal and Shikin will estimate the pace needed to reach it.

empty.title: No savings goals yet
empty.description: Create your first savings goal to start tracking your progress.
